_note: FIXTURE seed data calibrated to Georgia's documented auto-manufacturing trajectory through 2024-2025 — Kia Georgia (West Point) opening 2009, SK On batteries (Commerce) 2022-2023, HMGMA (Bryan County) Oct 2024, HL-GA Battery (Cartersville) 2025, Rivian (Stanton Springs) paused 2024. Replaced by scripts/fetch_automotive.py once the BLS QCEW + BEA + Census + Tavily pipeline runs.
source: FIXTURE (target: BLS QCEW NAICS 3361/3362/3363 + BEA SAGDP2N motor vehicle GDP + Census CBP + Tavily plant milestones)

plants.name: Hyundai Motor Group Metaplant America (HMGMA)
plants.product: IONIQ 5 EVs (and IONIQ 9 ramping); battery pack assembly
plants.note: Began production October 2024. Anchor of Georgia's EV corridor; 2,900-acre megasite.

plants.name: Kia Georgia (KGA)
plants.note: Georgia's first major auto assembly plant. Production began Nov 2009.

_hint.snippet: Kia Georgia's West Point plant started production of the 2027 Telluride in 2026 and reached its 5 millionth vehicle milestone. Production te

plants.name: HL-GA Battery Company
plants.company: Hyundai Motor Group + LG Energy Solution JV
plants.product: EV battery cells (NCM) for IONIQ + Kia EV models
plants.note: Production began 2025. 30 GWh annual capacity — enough for ~300K EVs.

_hint.snippet: HL-GA Battery Company in Georgia resumed construction in 2025 and aims to start production in the first half of 2026. Hyundai's Georgia plan

plants.name: SK On Commerce
plants.product: EV battery cells for Ford, Volkswagen
plants.note: Plant 1 online 2022; Plant 2 online 2023. Combined 21.5 GWh capacity.

plants.name: Hyundai Mobis (HMGMA campus)
plants.product: EV battery system modules (PE Modules) for HMGMA
plants.note: Co-located with HMGMA; supplies battery packs directly to assembly line.

_hint.snippet: Hyundai Mobis' Ellabell, Georgia plant began full production in 2024 and plans to expand output to 500,000 vehicles by 2026. The plant produ

plants.name: Aspen Aerogels Plant 2
plants.product: PyroThin® thermal barriers (EV battery fire protection)
plants.note: Announced 2022; opened 2025. Sole-source supplier to GM — also serves Toyota and Stellantis.

_hint.snippet: Aspen Aerogels abandoned plans for Plant 2 in Statesboro, Georgia, and listed the site for sale in 2025. Production remains halted. The comp

plants.name: Rivian — Stanton Springs
plants.note: Announced Dec 2021 at $5B / 7,500 jobs. Site preparation paused in March 2024 — Rivian shifted R2 launch to its existing Illinois plant. Future of site uncertain.

_hint.snippet: Rivian's Georgia plant construction resumes in 2026, with production starting in 2028. The facility aims for an annual capacity of 300,000 v

plants.name: Anovion Technologies
plants.product: Synthetic graphite anode material for EV batteries
plants.note: $117M DOE grant in 2022. Phase 1 construction underway; commercial production targeted late 2026.

_hint.snippet: Anovion Technologies' auto plant in Bainbridge, Georgia, is still in fundraising mode for construction, with no confirmed start date. Full p

milestones.label: Kia announces West Point plant
milestones.detail: Kia commits $1.1B for Georgia's first auto assembly plant — in part lured by a $410M state incentive package.

milestones.label: Kia Georgia begins production
milestones.detail: Production starts Nov 2009. Sorento is the first vehicle off the line; Telluride added in 2018 becomes Kia's best-selling SUV in the U.S.

milestones.label: SK Innovation announces Commerce battery plant
milestones.detail: $2.6B investment in two adjacent EV battery cell plants, anchored by Ford and Volkswagen supply contracts.

milestones.label: Hyundai Metaplant announced
milestones.detail: May 2022: Hyundai Motor Group commits $5.5B to a 2,900-acre EV plant in Bryan County. Investment later grows to $7.6B.

milestones.label: Rivian announces Stanton Springs
milestones.detail: Dec 2021/2022: Rivian commits $5B for a 7,500-job EV plant in Morgan/Walton County to build the R2.

milestones.label: SK On Plant 2 online
milestones.detail: Second SK On battery plant in Commerce begins commercial production, bringing combined capacity to ~21.5 GWh.

milestones.label: HMGMA starts production
milestones.detail: October 2024: first IONIQ 5 rolls off the HMGMA line, less than 30 months after groundbreaking — one of the fastest auto plant builds in U.S. history.

milestones.label: Rivian pauses Georgia plant
milestones.detail: March 2024: Rivian indefinitely pauses Stanton Springs construction to redirect R2 launch to its existing Illinois plant. Georgia incentive clawback provisions are triggered.

milestones.label: HL-GA Battery operational
milestones.detail: Hyundai/LG joint-venture battery plant in Cartersville reaches commercial production — 30 GWh annual capacity supplies HMGMA and Kia.

employment.source: BLS QCEW annual averages, NAICS 3361+3362+3363 (motor vehicle mfg + bodies/trailers + parts), GA (area 13000)

ev_investment.source: Tavily → DECD / Gov. office / AJC cumulative EV investment figure

plants.source: Tavily → AJC / Reuters / state press; hints only, not status overwrites

source_summary: Live sources updated 2026-06-02: employment, establishments, ev_investment, plants. Stale or static: industry_gdp, state_comparison, milestones.
